title: brachiaria ramosa
intro: Brachiaria ramosa, also known as kabra, is a type of grass native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Brachiaria ramosa include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
